disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden high temperature (38.6 on the facility thermometer) with shaking chills/rigors that came on overnight
trigger_question_examples: Has there been a fever or shivering?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — the temperature was 38.6 overnight and the patient was shaking with cold, teeth chattering. The nurses gave paracetamol about an hour ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A previously small, soft, painless neck lump has rapidly enlarged over about 24 hours and become painful and tender
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the neck lump — how quickly did it change?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The lump on the right of the neck was there before but small and didn't hurt. Overnight it doubled in size, went red and is now painful and hard to turn the neck.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Drenching night sweats overnight requiring a full change of bed linen
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The sheets were soaked right through — the staff had to change all the bedding overnight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Three weeks of worsening fatigue and lethargy, with new early satiety (feeling full quickly) over the past week
trigger_question_examples: How have things been over the past few weeks?
Any change in appetite or energy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Very drained and tired for about three weeks, and this past week getting full very quickly when trying to eat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known chronic blood/white-cell cancer watched for about five years with no treatment, and told the immune system is weakened by it
trigger_question_examples: Any problems with the immune system?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a slow-growing blood cancer of the white cells that's just been monitored for about five years, and we've been told the immune system is weak because of it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New easy bruising on both forearms with no injury, and looking pale
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There are a few new bruises on both forearms that no one can explain, and the staff say the patient looks quite pale.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Normally walks with a frame but is bedbound tonight due to exhaustion and shaking
trigger_question_examples: Is the patient able to get up and move about?
How is mobility tonight compared to normal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Normally gets around with a walking frame, but tonight is stuck in bed — too exhausted and shaking too much to stand.
